name: Land Pull Request
description: Run the Elves PR landing loop: collect feedback, fix blockers, prove, wait, and land only when safe.

fields.name: allow_merge
fields.description: Whether the agent may merge when all gates pass

steps.name: collect
steps.prompt:
Collect complete PR state for {{ pr_url }}.

Read PR description, comments, reviews, checks, requested changes, branch state, and local diff. Write state to `docs/elves/pr-landing-{{ id }}.md`.

steps.name: fresh
steps.prompt:
Perform a fresh read-only review of the PR diff.

Compare base to HEAD, check review comments against current code, and identify true blockers versus already-fixed comments. Update `docs/elves/pr-landing-{{ id }}.md`.

steps.name: fix
steps.prompt:
Fix only PR landing blockers.

Address unresolved requested changes, failing checks, and fresh-review blockers. Avoid new feature work. If a blocker is unsafe or ambiguous, stop and document the exact human decision needed.

steps.name: prove
steps.prompt:
Prove the PR is ready to land.

Run targeted tests and broader sensible checks. Re-read PR checks and review status. Update landing notes with exact evidence.

on_reject.prompt:
PR proof failed or was rejected: {{ rejection_reason }}

Fix blockers and prove again.

steps.name: wait
steps.prompt:
Wait for and re-read asynchronous PR surfaces.

Refresh checks, reviews, bot comments, and inline threads. If new blockers appear, reject back to fix. If no blockers remain, proceed to land gate.

on_reject.prompt:
New PR feedback appeared: {{ rejection_reason }}

Address it before attempting to land.

steps.name: land
steps.prompt:
Land the PR only if safe.

If `allow_merge` is false, stop with a final ready-to-merge report. If true, merge only when the worktree is clean, checks are green, approvals are sufficient, no requested changes remain, and the branch is current. Record the result.
